MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS LLC Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition.

Petitioner J.G. Wentworth Originations LLC's Petition for Approval of Transfer of Payment Rights is OFF CALENDAR.

Petitioner submitted a request for dismissal of the petition on August 8, 2025, and the clerk has entered a dismissal pursuant to the request. This hearing is off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
